CONTENT.Honours: FC SionSwiss Cup: 2019–20Young BoysSwiss Super League: 2020–21, 2023–24Swiss Cup: 2022–23
CONTENT.Club career: On 25 July 2023, Maceiras signed a two-year contract with Puskás Akadémia in Hungary.
CONTENT.Personal life: Maceiras was born in Switzerland and is of Spanish descent.

SUMMARY: Quentin Maceiras Pralong (born 10 October 1995) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defender for Hungarian club Puskás Akadémia.
